name: gitlab
description: Inspect GitLab projects, issues, merge requests, diffs, and comments through the GitLab connector.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect GitLab projects, issues, and merge requests
interface.longDescription: Use GitLab to inspect projects, issues, merge requests, diffs, commits, comments, and related code context through the GitLab connector.
defaultPrompt: Inspect GitLab issues and merge requests relevant to this task.
